◎简　　介  

　　Gizelle and Charrisse's friendship hangs in the balance following Gizelle's shocking accusation about Charrisse. When the two ladies finally get together to talk, all bets are off! Ashley's involvement in a new charity threatens her responsibilities to her and Michael's restaurant. Robyn and Juan adjust to their new lives, while Karen and Ray butt heads.
